name: Consort Yu

skills.name: Blessing of the Dryads
skills.description: Basic Attacks have a chance to grant an extra Basic Attack that dealsdamage and slows the enemy.

skills.name: Oak Bolt
skills.description: Fires an arrow in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies hit

skills.name: Protecting Winds
skills.description: Removes crowd control effects while gaining increased Movement Speedand invulnerability to physical damage for a period of time.The next Basic Attack will trigger Blessing of the Dryads.Passive: Gains increased Attack Speed.

skills.name: Vaulting Shot
skills.description: Jumps to the target, stunning and slowing them, then flips back to the start point and shoots 2 bolts at them. Gains immunity while using this skill and Attack Speed upon landing.

tips: Consort Yu (Marksman): Tier S on international ranked — 51.88% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Twinblades of Destruction.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.88%, pick 1.53%, ban 0.2%, popularity tier S.
Counters Marco Polo, Han Xin · Weak into Luna, Diaochan.

faqs.question: Is Consort Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Consort Yu is Tier S Marksman with 51.88% win rate, 1.53% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Consort Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Twinblades of Destruction, Shadow Ripper, Bloodsoul, Mortal Punisher. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Consort Yu?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Consort Yu: Luna, Diaochan. Consort Yu is strong into Marco Polo, Han Xin.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Marco Polo, Han Xin. Countered by: Luna, Diaochan.
